criteria.description: test_distribution xfail removed so init-with-flags regressions surface as real failures
criteria.evidence: WP01 T001: removed @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=False) from TestUpgradeWithAllMissions::test_upgrade_updates_templates in tests/adversarial/test_distribution.py; test now PASSES (no XFAIL/XPASS).
criteria.notes: Reviewed and approved in WP01 cycle 2.

criteria.description: Pathological mid8-mismatch test covers mission_branch_name and lane_branch_name
criteria.evidence: WP01 T002+T003: tests/core/test_branch_naming_human_slug.py adds test_mission_branch_name_does_not_strip_different_mid8_suffix and test_lane_branch_name_pathological_mid8_mismatch (slug my-feature-AAAA1111 + mission_id 01KV3NGSDCJ272573TF6T6NWDW); both pass.

criteria.description: doctrine_kind_subdir returns singular subdir names matching .gitignore whitelist
criteria.evidence: WP02 T005+T006: src/charter/synthesizer/artifact_naming.py returns directive/tactic/styleguide; callers in write_pipeline.py and staging.py updated. mypy --strict and ruff clean.
WP02 T004: git rm of 7 adapter_id:fixture placeholder sidecar files committed in 0b6e2d7d9 without corresponding doctrine artifacts.
criteria.notes: Bootstrap placeholders; reconstructable via charter synthesize.

criteria.description: charter bundle validate exits 0 on built_in_only fresh-seed state
criteria.evidence: WP02 T007+T008: _manifest_is_fresh_seed() early-exit in src/charter/bundle.py (built_in_only=True AND artifacts==[]); tests/specify_cli/charter/test_bundle_validate_fresh_seed.py (3 tests) pass including stale-sidecar reproduction.

criteria.description: Adding a provider requires editing only one module
criteria.evidence: WP03 T009-T011 + WP04 T012-T018: each provider module self-registers at module scope via SurfaceProviderRegistry.register(); service.py derives all config from the registry.
criteria.notes: Self-registration seam established; no central literal lists remain.

criteria.description: Each provider self-declares its registration at import time
criteria.evidence: WP04 T012-T018: all 7 provider modules call SurfaceProviderRegistry.register(SurfaceRegistration(...)) at module scope; test_provider_registration.py::test_all_providers_registered asserts exactly 7 registrations.

criteria.description: Registry supports multi-definition, synthetic-key, and multi-token providers
criteria.evidence: WP03 T009 + WP04: SurfaceRegistration carries definitions tuple, synthetic_key, kind_tokens dict. Verified live: session_presence has 3 defs, plugin_bundle has synthetic_key=plugin_bundle, native_config exposes hyphen+underscore tokens.

criteria.description: Coordinator derives all config from registry; Directive-030 conformance test enforces no central literals
criteria.evidence: WP03 T011 + WP04 T019: service.py build_providers/build_registry/_KIND_TOKENS derive from registry; tests/specify_cli/tool_surface/test_provider_registration.py::test_service_py_has_no_central_provider_literals AST-asserts no provider list literal.
criteria.notes: Success Criterion 3 structural proxy; reviewed and approved.

criteria.description: Provider ordering is deterministic via explicit order field
criteria.evidence: WP03 T009: SurfaceRegistration.order with duplicate-order ValueError guard; test_provider_registration.py::test_registration_orders_are_unique asserts unique ordering (0-60).

criteria.description: map-requirements resolves spec.md from main checkout when a coord worktree is present
criteria.evidence: WP05 T020: src/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/tasks.py map_requirements uses resolve_feature_dir_for_slug (coord-aware) instead of resolve_feature_dir_for_mission; tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/test_map_requirements_coord.py (3 tests) pass.

criteria.description: finalize-tasks zero-match ownership errors include create_intent hint even with a nearest-match suggestion
criteria.evidence: WP05 T021: src/specify_cli/ownership/validation.py validate_glob_matches appends create_intent hint unconditionally after the optional nearest-match suggestion; 120 ownership tests pass.
